text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few weeks have passed since Tosen Jordan split
her toenail. It hasn't been easy, but she's finally
ready for the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Thanks to you helping me take care of it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It'll definitely hold up. At least for the Satsuki
Sho.
choice_data_list: I'd like you to keep running after that, too.
I'd like you to keep running after that, too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...I know. That's why I've been extra careful with
my nails lately.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But right now... I want to focus on this race.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I know it could get ugly after. This might even be
my last go, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I still want to be an amazing Umamusume. I made
up my mind to devote everything to racing, and
I'm not going back on that.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, it's you. Hah, good. It's not a gamble
without some unknowns to spice things up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(That's Nakayama Festa, a gambling lover who
joined Tracen at the same time as Tosen Jordan.)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Am I wrong? I was betting you wouldn't show up
today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? But why? I've been super hyped for today!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Well... let's just say, train long enough and you
get to witness certain happenings.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
And yet, you showed up. I wonder how the
Goddesses' dice will fall...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Dice? Oh, like sugoroku? I love that game! You
too? How funny.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I get it. You've got the same stink of stupid
as she does...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Who're you calling stupid?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
The kind of stupid that would flip the gameboard
over and throw fish on it. ...Ah, well.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
The dice were cast when you showed up. They
said the Oka Sho on the Tiara tour would be the
hottest table this year, but...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Looks like they were wrong. Haha... This is the real beginning.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Guess I just have to go with the flow. You've
come prepared, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What was that all about? What "beginning"?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well... I guess that might be the case for some...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...But I'm gonna do this!
